movie.actors: Bobcat Goldthwait, Dabney Coleman, John Candy, Virginia Madsen
movie.plot: Fred P. Chaney receives as inheritance after the death of his mother a speaking horse that also has good knowledge about the stock-market. With the help of this horse Fred gains a lot at the stock-market of Chicago.
movie.title: Hot to Trot
movie.writer: Stephen Neigher (story), Hugo Gilbert (story), Stephen Neigher (screenplay), Hugo Gilbert (screenplay), Charlie Peters (screenplay)
